title: Mirrored Catalog Definition
description: Defines a MirroredCatalog item that mirrors tables from an external Iceberg REST Catalog (IRC) API compliant provider into Fabric by creating delegated shortcuts to provider storage. Metadata is mirrored; data is not copied.

$schema.description: The schema version of the MirroredCatalog definition.

mountedTables.description: Lists the tables to be mirrored from the source catalog. If not specified, all tables under the scope will be mirrored and new tables will be automatically added.

SourceProperties.title: Source Properties
SourceProperties.description: Describes the source catalog connection and scope configuration.

type.description: The type of the source catalog provider.

typeProperties.description: Properties for the source connection, such as connectionId, scope.

SourceType.title: Source Type
SourceType.description: The type of the source catalog provider. Additional source types may be added over time.

SourceTypeProperties.title: Source Type Properties
SourceTypeProperties.description: Connection and scope properties for the source catalog.

connectionId.description: The connection identifier for the source catalog.

scope.description: The namespace hierarchy path that scopes the mirroring. Must be a Selectable scope as returned by the List Scopes API. A Selectable scope is a namespace that is a parent of one or more leaf namespaces containing tables.

MountedTable.title: Mounted Table
MountedTable.description: Defines a table to be mirrored from the source catalog.

MountedTableSourceProperties.title: Mounted Table Source Properties
MountedTableSourceProperties.description: Source properties for a mounted table.

typeProperties.description: Type properties for the source table.

MountedTableSourceTypeProperties.title: Mounted Table Source Type Properties
MountedTableSourceTypeProperties.description: Fully qualified scope and table name identifying a table in the source catalog.

fullyQualifiedScope.description: The fully qualified namespace hierarchy for this table (e.g., ["Accounting", "US", "Taxes"]).

tableName.description: The table name of the source table.
